name: devops-analytics
description: Engineering Intelligence Agent — V3 planning + V1 execution. Intent routing, linear pipeline, graph memory via markdown, profile inference.

interface.shortDescription: V3 planning + V1 execution — adaptive DevOps intelligence
interface.longDescription: 6-skill pipeline: orchestrator with intent routing and profile inference, event collection from git/GitHub, timeline+graph construction, unified reasoning (risk/RCA/trend), action planning, multi-language report composition. Memory via markdown files. Every skill has strict IO contract.
